message:
feat(flywheel): comprehensive workflow-focused redesign with X thread insights

Major enhancements to the flywheel section:

WORKFLOW-FOCUSED CONTENT:
- Added 4 real-world workflow scenarios from daily use:
  - Daily Parallel Progress (6+ agents, 7+ projects)
  - Agents Reviewing Agents (peer review loop)
  - 5,500 Lines to 347 Beads (massive planning decomposition)
  - Fresh Eyes Code Review (systematic bug discovery)

- Added 8 battle-tested prompts from X threads:
  - Deep Code Exploration, Agent Peer Review, UX/UI Scrutiny
  - Comprehensive Beads Planning, Plan Space Validation
  - Systematic Bead Execution, Post-Implementation Review
  - Intelligent Commit Grouping

- Added 6 synergy explanations showing 10x multiplier effects:
  - The Core Loop (NTM + Mail + BV)
  - Collective Memory (CASS + CM)
  - Safety Net (UBS + SLB)
  - Approval Workflow, Learned Patterns, Account Orchestration

UI/UX IMPROVEMENTS:
- Kept interactive FlywheelVisualization component
- New HeroSection with key metrics (6+ agents, 7+ projects, 2K+ stars)
- Expandable workflow cards with step-by-step breakdowns
- Copy-to-clipboard prompts for Stream Deck integration
- Mobile-optimized grid layouts with proper touch targets
- Responsive typography scaling for all screen sizes

The page now tells the STORY of how tools work together,
not just what each tool does individually.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
